fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged volatility ETF, is positioned as a tool for uncertain times and a surrogate for S&P 500 bear positions. Recent analyses highlight its unique hedging capabilities, though also caution that its leveraged nature means "good things do not last." The articles suggest its utility is tied to market volatility, implying its performance is highly dependent on the broader market's direction and VIX levels.
